input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.1.1
            TITLE: the electronic throttle must automatically close (return to idle) when power is removed.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.1.1: The electronic throttle must automatically close (return to idle) when power is removed.
IC.4.1.1 The electronic throttle must automatically close (return to idle) when power is removed.

final_answer: The electronic throttle must automatically close (return to idle) when power is removed.
